note: Capsule column in Latest Transactions + Capsule block in TX detail panel. The header now reads TXID | CAPSULE | BLOCK | TYPE | IN | OUT | AMOUNT | FEE; the new column shows e.g. 'structured · receipt' for a TX whose output[0] carries an SCPv1 capsule, or '—' otherwise. Click on the capsule cell opens the same TX detail as the TXID link. The detail panel now adds three rows below inputs/outputs: capsule (Open Note / Structured Data / Certification / Document Reference + body byte count), template (e.g. payment_receipt_v1) when the type carries one, and text (the decoded fields/note for the public modes). Backend RPCs gettransaction and listtransfers now return a capsule summary (type, template, body_len, text) plus per-output payload_hex on gettransaction; the explorer prefers the node's summary and falls back to parsing payload_hex for older nodes. NOT in this release: tx_index legacy-format backfill (the 'TX NOT FOUND - All outputs spent and tx-index not available' fallback for very old TXs is unchanged). Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
